explanation: This command attempts to import a PowerShell module from the Temp directory using single quotes and minimal spacing, which may bypass detection by altering the string formatting.
This command uses URL-encoded space (\x20) and omits quotes to obfuscate the command line while still referencing the Appdata directory, potentially evading pattern-based detection.
This command uses the alias 'ipmo' for 'Import-Module' and escaped backslashes, which may evade detection by altering syntax and escaping characters.
This command uses URL-encoded space (\x20) and double quotes to obfuscate the command line while referencing the Appdata directory, potentially evading pattern-based detection.
This command references the 'Public' directory using the $Env:Public environment variable instead of the full path, which may bypass detection by avoiding hardcoded suspicious paths.
